text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On our way home one day, the rascal leader from
the other day spots us and comes over to greet
Kawakami Princess.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Wearing a Cap
text_block_list.text: Hey, Sis! Let's plaaay!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Well, aren't you just bursting with energy! Sure,
I'll spend some time with you!
choice_data_list: You two are getting along well.
You two are getting along well.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Of course! To be honest, we've become the town's
mightiest princess sisters!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Wearing a Cap
text_block_list.text: The mightiest and the princessiest!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems the rascal leader has even started to
copy some of Kawakami Princess's mannerisms. I
feel like I've seen a relationship like this before...
choice_data_list:
She looks up to you in the same way you look
up to King Halo.

She looks up to you in the same way you look
up to King Halo.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Th-that thought never crossed my mind!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm, now that you say it, that makes this a
huge responsibility! Is it up to me to determine
the kind of Umamusume she grows up to be?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Wearing a Cap
text_block_list.text:
What's the matter? Let's hurry up and play
already!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I must turn her into an excellent princess! But
what can I teach her that will set her on the best
path?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
What would King do in this situation? Hmm...
Hmmmm...

text_block_list.name: Imaginary King
text_block_list.text:
You appear to be troubled by something,
Kawakami.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huh?! It's... King?!

text_block_list.name: Imaginary King
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I am the image of King that lives within your
subconscious. But never mind that. Listen closely,
as I am about to offer some advice.

text_block_list.name: Imaginary King
text_block_list.text:
In a situation like this, the first thing you need to
do is teach her the mannerisms befitting a
princess!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I see, I see. Thank you, King... Or should I say,
Imaginary King?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Right! I've decided! I'll start by teaching you how
a princess uses her chopsticks!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Wearing a Cap
text_block_list.text: What? We playin' house or somethin'?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! No, nothing of the sort! This is the first step
on your path to becoming an excellent princess!

text_block_list.name: Imaginary King
text_block_list.text:
Don't be discouraged. Remember, you're the
teacher!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, the rascal leader doesn't take to
Kawakami Princess's zealous teaching methods,
and the two fail to get on the same wavelength.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
A princess must always be elegant and reserved,
even when partaking of sweets.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Wearing a Cap
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, enough of this! Why're you actin' all weird
today?! You sound like my mom!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm only doing this for your own sake! Are you
really not going to listen to me?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Wearing a Cap
text_block_list.text:
This is stupid! I thought you were cool, but now
you're acting weird! I hate it!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
choice_data_list: You might be missing the mark here...
You might be missing the mark here...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Yes, you're right. A princess doesn't beat around
the bush! I have to lead by example!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Now pay close attention. I'm about to
demonstrate a great leap right over that jungle
gym there!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Wearing a Cap
text_block_list.text: Huuuh?! No way! That's impossible!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! But being impossible is what makes it
worth accomplishing!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hrryaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, with a bit of a run-up, Kawakami Princess
leaps spectacularly over the jungle gym!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Wearing a Cap
text_block_list.text: Get outta here! That was awesome! I've never seen someone jump so high!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Except, that's not the point! What's important is
that I overcame the obstacle before me!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
So what if the way forward seems impossible?
That is the way of a princess—to achieve the
impossible!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Do you understand what I'm trying to do now?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Wearing a Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah!
choice_data_list: You've become more like a princess yourself.
Don't you think that was a tad too extravagant?
Don't you think that was a tad too extravagant?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Wearing a Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah!
choice_data_list: You've become more like a princess yourself.
Don't you think that was a tad too extravagant?
Don't you think that was a tad too extravagant?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Gehehe... It's all thanks to my diligent princess
training under your guidance!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Now I'm going to pull off something even
cooler! Watch me jump over both the jungle gym
and the slide at the same time!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Wearing a Cap
text_block_list.text: Oooh! I can't wait to see that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I frantically try to stop Kawakami Princess,
explaining to her that she's already shown
enough. And the day comes to a close.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! But what do you even mean?! I'm only
trying to demonstrate in the clearest way what a
princess is!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Wearing a Cap
text_block_list.text:
That's right! I'm bein' inspired here! You sayin'
stop just means you got no class!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Indeed. That's precisely right. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In any case, it appears that the bond between
teacher and student has grown even deeper!
